name: Taleo Corporation
description: Taleo Corporation was a prominent provider of cloud-based talent management software, headquartered in Dublin, California. The company specialized in solutions for talent acquisition, performance management, learning and development, and compensation management, helping organizations streamline their human resources processes. Taleo served a global client base, offering robust tools to manage the entire employee lifecycle. In February 2012, Taleo Corporation was acquired by Oracle Corporation for approximately $1.9 billion, and its products were subsequently integrated into the Oracle Human Capital Management (HCM) cloud suite to enhance enterprise talent management capabilities.
